TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi sealed BeforeOnBehalfOfInitialized extends System.MulticastDelegate
Public Delegate Sub BeforeOnBehalfOfInitialized(eventArgs As OnBehalfOfEventArgs)
type BeforeOnBehalfOfInitialized = delegate of OnBehalfOfEventArgs -> unit

Docs.param: Event arguments containing the user assertion token. Handlers can modify to replace the assertion.
Docs.summary: Signature for a sync event that fires before the on-behalf-of flow is initialized.
